responsibilities: Design enterprise-wide data architecture strategies that align with long-term business and analytics goals
Define data modeling standards and governance frameworks to ensure consistency across all data platforms
Architect scalable data lakehouse solutions that support both batch and real-time analytical workloads
Evaluate and select data technologies and platforms that align with organizational scalability and cost goals
Establish master data management strategies to ensure consistent, trusted data across business systems
Collaborate with security and compliance teams to design data architectures meeting regulatory requirements
Guide engineering teams in implementing architectural standards for data pipelines and storage systems
Develop data integration strategies that connect disparate source systems into unified data platforms
Create and maintain architectural documentation, including data flow diagrams and system blueprints
Advise executive leadership on data strategy, platform investments, and emerging data technology trends
